name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Victor, MT's Farmers State Bank at 103 Main St provides accessible banking services.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank operates a branch location at 103 Main St in Victor, MT, serving the local community with comprehensive banking services. The branch is a standalone facility, easily accessible to Victor residents and businesses in the surrounding area.

This Victor, MT location offers a full range of banking products including savings and checking accounts, personal loans, business banking, and other essential financial services. Customers seeking service details or wishing to discuss banking needs with a representative should contact the branch.

For Victor residents, this Farmers State Bank branch provides convenient access to banking services during regular operating hours. Bring your government-issued ID and any relevant account documentation when visiting. The bank has established itself as a trusted financial partner for the Victor community.
services: Account switching assistance via Switch Kit
Legacy Club membership with financial benefits and travel opportunities
Community scholarship program for high school seniors
pros: Over $1 million awarded in scholarships since 2001, with $6 million commitment over 30 years
Fourth-generation family-owned business providing personalized relationship banking since 1907
10 branch locations across Western Montana counties (Ravalli, Missoula, Flathead, Lewis and Clark)
Donates approximately $115,000 annually to local nonprofits focusing on children, families, and education
Offers online banking, mobile app, and remote deposit services for convenient account access
Full range of services including mortgages, personal loans, checking, savings, and CDs
Switch Kit available to help customers easily transfer accounts from other banks
cons: Limited to Western Montana service area with no presence outside regional counties
Minimal information on interest rates, fees, or loan terms available on website
No online account opening process described; appears to require in-person or phone contact
Limited digital banking features compared to larger national banks or neobanks
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or business banking beyond basic small business loans
best_for: Western Montana residents seeking community-focused banking and personalized service
Local business owners and entrepreneurs in Ravalli, Missoula, Flathead, and Lewis and Clark counties
Homebuyers in Montana looking for mortgage services from a local, independent lender
Consumers who prioritize bank reinvestment in local education and community nonprofits
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for Western Montana residents and businesses seeking traditional banking services with a strong community reinvestment focus and personalized relationship banking. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank only serves Western Montana counties—making it unsuitable for customers outside this region or those requiring national branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Farmers State Bank at 103 Main St, Victor, MT. Full banking services for Victor locals.
